ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* French size equivalent */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Italian size equivalent */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Range of bust measurements */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Range of waist measurements */,
  "hips_range" TEXT /* Range of hips measurements */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_standard" TEXT /* Preferred size standard of the customer */,
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's measurement profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_measurement_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_profile_id") REFERENCES measurement_profiles ("measurement_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_profiles" (
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement profile */,
  "bust" REAL /* Customer's bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Customer's hips measurement */,
  "height" REAL /* Customer's height */,
  "weight" REAL /* Customer's weight */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing product */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard for the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order from which the product is returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the product was returned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the request */,
  "from_size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard from which conversion is requested */,
  "to_size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard to which conversion is requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion request */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* Original size before conversion */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* Converted size */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date the conversion was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES size_conversion_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_manufacturers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
